The '''Palaquin system''', also known as the '''Sperin system''', was in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], home to the planet of [[Sperin]]. It was in the [[Bajic sector/Legends|Bajic sector]] which was controlled by [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Kintaro]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].
